goals.title: Implement TimeTrack routing and UI optimization: create branch, split...
goals.objective: Implement TimeTrack routing and UI optimization: create branch, split settings into layered sections, add timeline fit/split display controls to avoid horizontal scrolling, add multi-tag activity categories with primary category counted in stats and secondary tags for filtering, add stats dimension switching for activity/category/duration/category+duration, add sort controls for duration/count/color asc/desc, preserve offline-first SQLite/Supabase/LAN/file interop behavior, update tests and verify Flutter UI.

successCriteria.scenario: Browser/Flutter widget real-surface: render StatsPage and SettingsPage at compact and expanded widths after implementation; drive category assignment controls, settings section navigation, stats dimension/sort controls, and timeline display-mode controls through widget tests plus captured Flutter test stdout.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/routing-ui-analytics/evidence/C001-ui-happy.txt: focused UI/widget tests exit 0, 63/63 passed; cleanup: no spawned runtime state

successCriteria.scenario: Data auxiliary surface: run focused repository/model tests proving SQLite v8 category/link migration, v1/v2 sync bundle compatibility, primary category counted while secondary tags only filter, unclassified fallback, duration buckets, and stats sort asc/desc by duration/count/color.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/routing-ui-analytics/evidence/C002-data-edge.txt: focused repository/model tests exit 0, category migration/sync/stats edge cases covered; cleanup: no spawned runtime state

successCriteria.scenario: Regression auxiliary/UI surface: run flutter analyze and focused regression widget/tests for existing timeline entry editing, settings update card, adaptive layout, app shell shortcuts, and sync interop to prove neighboring behavior still works.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/routing-ui-analytics/evidence/C003-regression.txt: requested regression tests exit 0 (41/41), flutter analyze exit 0, full flutter test exit 0 (151/151); cleanup: no spawned runtime state

goals.evidence: C001 focused UI/widget tests passed 63/63; C002 category data/model edge cases passed in focused tests; C003 requested regression tests passed 41/41, flutter analyze passed, full flutter test passed 151/151.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/routing-ui-analytics/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/routing-ui-analytics/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.

aggregateCompletion.evidence: C001 focused UI/widget tests passed 63/63; C002 category data/model edge cases passed in focused tests; C003 requested regression tests passed 41/41, flutter analyze passed, full flutter test passed 151/151.

goal.objective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/routing-ui-analytics/goals.json for TimeTrack routing/UI/category/statistics optimization; use .omo/ulw-loop/routing-ui-analytics/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
